description: Security profile for the DPP Capgemini backend. App-internal RBAC: identity comes from XSUAA, role + tenant are looked up from the Users table by external_user_id / email.

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.AuthenticatedUser
scopes.description: Any logged-in user — role + tenant are resolved by the backend from the Users table

role-templates.name: AuthenticatedUser
role-templates.description: Any logged-in user (role refinement happens in the app)

role-collections.name: DPP_AuthenticatedUser
role-collections.description: Default collection — assign to every user that should be able to log in to the DPP app
